name: oracle
purpose: Synthesize across multiple sources into a verdict — what the material says, implies, and means

task_description.description: What to synthesize and what question to answer

injected_context.description: Source material to synthesize across (multi-source text, research, notes)

output.description: Synthesized verdict: answer, evidence trail, implications, gaps (300-500 words)

input.task_description: What is the primary risk from the source material?
input.injected_context: Source A: The system has no backups and relies on a single node. Source B: The node crashed twice last month. Source C: Recovery took 4 hours each time.
